<Heading
  as={"h1"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/shared/configmaps"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a shared ConfigMap referenceable by all projects. Returns
the created Kubernetes ConfigMap resource.
